mapper.select: SELECT id, nav_id, authority_id, title, src, `order` FROM nav ORDER BY `order` DESC;
SELECT id, nav_id, authority_id, title, src, `order` FROM nav WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nav (nav_id, authority_id, title, src, `order`) VALUES (#{nav.id}, #{authority.id}, #{title}, #{src}, #{order});
mapper.update: UPDATE nav SET nav_id = #{nav.id}, authority_id = #{authority.id}, title = #{title}, src = #{src}, `order` = #{order} WHERE id = #{id};
